## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Page / URL
Which page or section is affected?

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What should happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happens.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120]
- Device: [e.g. Desktop / Mobile]
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11]
